Texts.LongWelcomeMessage: Welcome to the application. This is a startup project based on the ABP framework. For more information visit
Texts.InternalServerError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later or contact support if the problem persists.
Texts.CUInventory:Catalog:002: A product with SKU '{Sku}' already exists.
Texts.CUInventory:Procurement:001: A supplier with email '{Email}' already exists.
Texts.CUInventory:Procurement:002: A supplier with phone number '{PhoneNumber}' already exists.
Texts.CUInventory:Procurement:003: Purchase order '{PurchaseOrderId}' is {Status}; this action requires a draft order.
Texts.CUInventory:Procurement:005: Purchase order '{PurchaseOrderId}' is {Status}; this action requires a confirmed order.
Texts.CUInventory:Procurement:006: Purchase order '{PurchaseOrderId}' has no line for product '{ProductId}'.
Texts.CUInventory:Procurement:007: Receiving {Requested} of product '{ProductId}' exceeds the outstanding quantity of {Outstanding} on purchase order '{PurchaseOrderId}'.
Texts.CUInventory:Procurement:008: Purchase order '{PurchaseOrderId}' is {Status} and cannot be cancelled.
Texts.CUInventory:Procurement:009: Purchase order '{PurchaseOrderId}' has more than one line for product '{ProductId}'; combine them into a single line.
Texts.CUInventory:Warehousing:001: A warehouse with code '{Code}' already exists.
Texts.CUInventory:Warehousing:002: Shipment '{ShipmentId}' is {Status}; this action requires a draft shipment.
Texts.CUInventory:Warehousing:004: Shipment '{ShipmentId}' is {Status}; this action requires a dispatched shipment.
Texts.CUInventory:Warehousing:005: The shipment supplier does not match the supplier on purchase order '{PurchaseOrderId}'.
Texts.CUInventory:Warehousing:006: The shipment destination warehouse does not match the warehouse on purchase order '{PurchaseOrderId}'.
Texts.CUInventory:Warehousing:007: Shipping {Requested} of product '{ProductId}' exceeds the outstanding quantity of {Outstanding} on purchase order '{PurchaseOrderId}'.
Texts.CUInventory:Inventory:001: Insufficient stock for product '{ProductId}': {Requested} was requested but only {Available} is available.
Texts.CUInventory:Inventory:002: Balance '{InventoryBalanceId}' has only {Reserved} reserved; {Requested} was requested.
Texts.CUInventory:Inventory:003: Lot '{InventoryLotId}' has only {Remaining} remaining; {Requested} was requested.
Texts.CUInventory:Inventory:004: No inventory balance exists for product '{ProductId}' in warehouse '{WarehouseId}'.
Texts.CUInventory:Inventory:005: Stock transfer '{StockTransferId}' is {Status}; this action requires a draft transfer.
Texts.CUInventory:Inventory:007: Stock transfer '{StockTransferId}' is {Status}; this action requires a dispatched transfer.
Texts.CUInventory:Inventory:008: Stock transfer '{StockTransferId}' is {Status} and cannot be cancelled.
Texts.CUInventory:Inventory:009: A stock transfer cannot use the same warehouse '{WarehouseId}' as both source and destination.
Texts.CUInventory:Inventory:010: Restoring {Requested} to lot '{InventoryLotId}' would exceed its original quantity of {Original} (currently {Remaining} remaining).
Texts.CUInventory:Inventory:011: Lot '{InventoryLotId}' has only {Available} available; {Requested} was requested for reservation.
Texts.CUInventory:Inventory:012: Lot '{InventoryLotId}' has only {Reserved} reserved; {Requested} was requested.
Texts.CUInventory:Inventory:013: Stock transfer '{StockTransferId}' is {Status} and cannot be deleted; only draft or cancelled transfers can be deleted.
Texts.CUInventory:Inventory:014: Stock transfer '{StockTransferId}' has more than one line for product '{ProductId}'; combine them into a single line.
Texts.CUInventory:Sales:001: Sale '{SaleId}' is {Status}; this action requires a draft sale.
Texts.CUInventory:Sales:003: Sale '{SaleId}' is {Status} and cannot be deleted; only draft or cancelled sales can be deleted.
Texts.CUInventory:Sales:004: Allocation '{SaleAllocationId}' of sale '{SaleId}' has no inventory lot; cancel the sale and recreate it.
Texts.NoChartData: No data for the selected filters.
Texts.Name: Name
Texts.Validation:WarehouseRequiredForStrategy: Warehouse is required when the source strategy is 'Specific Warehouse'.
Texts.Validation:SupplierRequiredForStrategy: Supplier is required when the source strategy is 'Specific Supplier'.
Texts.Validation:LotRequiredForStrategy: Lot is required when the source strategy is 'Specific Lot'.
Texts.Products:Title: Products
Texts.Products:Subtitle: Catalog of products purchased from suppliers and sold to customers
Texts.Categories:Title: Categories
Texts.Categories:Subtitle: Product categories used for grouping and reporting
Texts.Suppliers:Title: Suppliers
Texts.Suppliers:Subtitle: Vendors that products are purchased from
Texts.Warehouses:Title: Warehouses
Texts.Warehouses:Subtitle: Storage locations across the branches
Texts.PurchaseOrders:Title: Purchase Orders
Texts.PurchaseOrders:Subtitle: Orders placed with suppliers; confirm to lock, then receive via shipments
Texts.Shipments:Title: Shipments
Texts.Shipments:Subtitle: Goods dispatched against purchase orders; receiving creates inventory lots
Texts.Shipments:Received: Shipment received — inventory lots created and stock updated.
Texts.StockTransfers:Title: Stock Transfers
Texts.StockTransfers:Subtitle: Move stock between warehouses with a safe two-phase dispatch → receive flow
Texts.StockTransfers:Dispatched: Transfer dispatched — stock reserved at source.
Texts.StockTransfers:Received: Transfer received — stock added at destination.
Texts.StockTransfers:ConfirmCancel: Cancel this transfer? Reserved stock returns to source.
Texts.StockTransfers:SameWarehouseError: Source and destination warehouses must differ.
Texts.StockTransfers:AllocationsHint: Which lots (and their originating suppliers) the dispatched quantity was drawn from.
Texts.InventoryBalances:Title: Inventory Balances
Texts.InventoryBalances:Subtitle: On-hand, reserved and available stock per warehouse and product — updates live
Texts.InventoryBalances:ThresholdHint: Alerts fire when available stock drops to or below this threshold. Leave empty to remove the threshold.
Texts.InventoryLots:Title: Inventory Lots
Texts.InventoryLots:Subtitle: Every unit of stock traces back to the shipment and supplier it came from — the basis of source tracking and cost reporting
Texts.Sales:Title: Sales
Texts.Sales:Subtitle: Create a sale to reserve stock, then confirm to commit — reservations prevent overselling
Texts.Sales:CreateHint: Each line picks how its stock is sourced: FIFO (oldest lots first) or pinned to a specific supplier, warehouse, or lot — this is how a sale traces back to the purchase it came from.
Texts.Sales:ConfirmCancel: Cancel this sale? Reserved stock will be released.
Texts.Dashboard:Title: Dashboard
Texts.Dashboard:Subtitle: Live inventory overview
Texts.Dashboard:Listening: Listening for stock changes… low-stock alerts will appear here as they happen.
Texts.Reports:Title: Reports
Texts.Reports:Subtitle: Filterable operational reports across warehouses, suppliers, categories and dates
Texts.Reports:SalesBySourceDesc: How much of each product sold came from which supplier, with revenue, cost and gross margin.
Texts.Reports:RemainingStockDesc: On-hand stock grouped by warehouse and originating supplier, valued at cost. Trace a shipment's leftovers.
Texts.Reports:InventoryValuationDesc: Total quantity and value on hand, grouped by warehouse and category.
Texts.Reports:LowStockDesc: Balances at or below their configured low-stock threshold.
Texts.Reports:SalesBySourceSubtitle: Which supplier the sold stock originally came from — with revenue, cost and gross margin
Texts.Reports:NoSalesMatch: No confirmed sales match these filters.
Texts.Reports:RemainingStockSubtitle: On-hand stock by warehouse and originating supplier, valued at cost — trace what's left from a shipment
Texts.Reports:InventoryValuationSubtitle: Total quantity and value on hand, grouped by warehouse and category
Texts.Reports:LowStockSubtitle: Balances at or below their configured low-stock threshold
